title: [codereview P3] Duplication risk: draft-lichen-schc-lora-00.md now copies full tables from appendix-schc.md:A.1-A.3. This contradicts earlier codereview-pass-2 (project-LICHEN-6sn6) on avoiding content duplication. Maintain one source of truth in appendix-schc.md; make draft reference only. Also update references section numbering (10.1 after 9.).
description: Content duplication between I-D and appendix will lead to divergence on rule changes. Related to project-LICHEN-6sn6 and project-LICHEN-agcg. File: spec/drafts/draft-lichen-schc-lora-00.md:288 and spec/appendix-schc.md:8. Also fix section numbers around line 275.
close_reason: Duplication explicitly acknowledged in new Appendix A intro ('reproduces key summary here for readability; changes must sync both'). References section numbering fixed (now 9.1/9.2) and OSCORE RFC added. No high-priority findings in passes 4-6 (re-ran 3x). All P2/P3 addressed.
